antibiotics.Clinical_Note: Targeted de-escalation to Linezolid monotherapy to seamlessly cover both the Vancomycin-susceptible MRSA bone isolate and Ampicillin/Linezolid-susceptible VRE wound isolate, ensuring accurate clinical causality and antimicrobial stewardship after S-intersection and intrinsic blocker application.

Targeted escalation to Colistin monotherapy following culture confirmation of Carbapenem-Resistant Pseudomonas aeruginosa (CRPA) pulmonary isolate. Colistin selected as the only agent with confirmed susceptibility after S-intersection and intrinsic resistance review (Ertapenem/Ceftriaxone blocked for Pseudomonas).
Definitive regimen selected via S-intersection after applying CLSI intrinsic resistance blockers and phenotype locks.
Definitive regimen selected via S-intersection after applying CLSI intrinsic resistance blockers and phenotype locks.
Definitive regimen selected via S-intersection after applying CLSI intrinsic resistance blockers and phenotype locks.
Definitive regimen selected via S-intersection after applying CLSI intrinsic resistance blockers and phenotype locks.
Targeted de-escalation to Linezolid for confirmed VRE cellulitis/sepsis after S-intersection (Vancomycin intrinsically blocked for VRE; Meropenem has no VRE activity).
